# Social icon asset provenance

These selected SVG marks are vendored from
[`gauravghongde/social-icons`](https://github.com/gauravghongde/social-icons),
`SVG/White`, on 2026-07-17.

The upstream project is an SVG/PNG asset collection rather than an installable
JavaScript package. Only the marks rendered by this site are included here so
unused artwork does not enter the production bundle.
